corporate.note: Standard company rate 27%; reduced from 28% effective 1 April 2022 for years of assessment ending on or after 31 March 2023

personal_income_tax.note: 7 brackets; 18% to 45%; rebates applied after tax calculated; secondary rebate for persons 65+; tertiary for 75+

consumption_tax.note: 15% VAT standard rate; administered by SARS; VAT201 returns submitted monthly or bi-monthly; zero-rated: basic foodstuffs, exports, international transport; exempt: residential rental, education

dividends_tax.note: 20% withheld at source by company declaring dividend; reduced by applicable DTA provisions

payroll_levies.note: UIF: employer 1% + employee 1% capped at ZAR 17,712/month; SDL: 1% of leviable amount, exempt if annual leviable amount < ZAR 500,000

capital_gains_tax.note: Capital gain included in taxable income at inclusion rate, then taxed at normal income tax rate

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Entity type, local, provincial/state, surtax, relief, filing, withholding, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, municipal, provincial/state, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
